characters.name: Leo Andromedos
characters.description: Leo AndromedosPersonalSpeciesVerdigreanEye colorBlackLove interest(s)VivianRelativesMrs. Andromedos†(wife)Nora Nebulon(daughter}Lloyd Nebulon(grandson)Francine Nebulon(granddaughter)Mr. Nebulon†(son-in-law)Voice actorsVoiced byBrian Doyle-Murray Leo Andromedosis the grandfather ofLloydandFrancineand the father ofNora. He is a father figure to Lloyd. Sometime in his youth he served in the galactic army until he met his future wife, whom proposed to him and the two got married and had at least one daughter:Nora Andromedos. After retiring from whatever profession he worked in, Leo stayed at theOld Folks Retirement Planet. Leo is a kind, caring but sometimes cranky old man who often keeps in touch with his family. Leo is very close to his grandson Lloyd, who in turn looks up to him like a sort of father figure. Leo has a weakness for not being able to talk to the opposite sex very well, often stumbling and stuttering his words and running away, a trait that he passed down to Lloyd. Leo is shown to be quite intelligent, still knowing several ancient Verdigrian customs such as "Theerlap", the Verdigrian holiday.

characters.name: Bitsy
characters.description: BitsyPersonalEye colorBlackVoice actorsVoiced byAria Curzon Bitsyis a friend and classmate ofFrancine Nebulon. She is most prominently featured in the episodes "Babysitter Lloyd", "Android Lloyd", "Lloyd Changes His Mind',  "Halloween Scary Action Fun Plan",  and "The Thrilla at Intrepidvilla." Bitsy is a little alien girl with dark orange skin and three eyes on stalks on the top of her head.  The middle eye has three lashes, while the others have two.  She has a mouth, but no nose.

characters.name: Kurt Blobberts
characters.description: Kurt BlobbertsPersonalSpeciesBlobullonGenderMaleAge13RelativesMr.andMrs. Blobberts(parents)Tina Blobberts(sister)Edna Blobberts (cousin)Jeb Blobberts (uncle)CareerOccupation(s)StudentVoice actorsVoiced byBill Fagerbakke Kurt BlobbertsisLloyd's large, one-eyed friend of theBlobullonspecies. While sometimes slow-witted, Kurt is a kind and loving character, but is usually treated the same as the rest of his group of friends. His head can be removed from his body and still function. Kurt is a humongous blob of a monster with purple skin, green spots and a single eyeball. He is about the same size for his sister while his parents are tiny. He also wears an orange outfit. His species is where Blobullons when they were children, they are huge with deep voices, and the adults are tiny with high-pitched voices. Kurt is an optimistic but somewhat dim-witted alien who is apparently somewhat illiterate. He always tries to find the bright-side to every situation, no matter how bleak it seems. Unlike his friends, Kurt has no real interest in becoming popular and only cares about being happy with himself. Kurt also appalls violence and would rather be friends rather that fight. Despite this all though, he is treated and regarded by the more popular social circle almost nonetheless the same as the rest of his group of more savvy and intelligent friends. However, when he and his best friend Douglas became Kurtlas, all the power went to their heads and they became the biggest bullies at Luna Vista Middle School until Lloyd talked some sense into them.

characters.name: Mr. Blobberts
characters.description: Mr. BlobbertsPersonalSpeciesBlobullonRelativesMrs. Blobberts (wife)Kurt Blobberts(son)Meena Blobberts (daughter) Mr. Blobbertsis a member of theBlobullonspecies. He is the father ofKurt BlobbertsandMeena Blobberts. He is married toMrs. Blobberts. Mr. Blobberts has a sweet-natured and friendly personality and he can be quite childlike. He enjoys things aimed at young children like children's movies and books. Mr. Blobberts has a sweet-natured and friendly personality and he can be quite childlike. He enjoys things aimed at young children like children's movies and books. He is easily scared of anything with too much action or violence which tend to upset him. This is shown inCampout on Zoltan IIIwhen the others begin telling scary stories, and inLloyd's Lost Weekendwhen the family is choosing a movie. Others on the station, such as Professor McNoggin, appear to find his childlike nature annoying. However, this does not to affect his life and relationships.

characters.name: Barbara Bolt
characters.description: Barbara BoltPersonalGenderFemaleAge154RelativesMr. Bolt (husband)CareerOccupation(s)7th grade teacher at Luna Vista Middle SchoolVoice actorsVoiced byTress MacNeille Mrs.Barbara Boltis Lloyd's teacher atLuna Vista Middle School. She is a cranky robot who gets very angry when Lloyd or any other student is messing around.

characters.name: Boomer
characters.description: BoomerPersonalGenderMaleAge21RelativesSleeveknot (brother)CareerOccupation(s)MechanicVoice actorsVoiced byDiedrich Bader Boomeris the mechanic who repairs all the spacecraft onIntrepidville. He is fairly simple-minded. It is revealed in "Boomer's Secret Life" that he is the heir to his race's throne, but he turned his title over to his brother Sleeveknot.

characters.name: Mr. Boviak
characters.description: Mr. BoviakPersonalRelativesMrs. Boviak(wife)Brittany Boviak(daughter) Mr. Boviakis the husband toMrs. Boviakand is the father ofBrittany Boviak.

characters.name: Mrs. Boviak
characters.description: Mrs. BoviakPersonalRelativesMr. Boviak(husband)Brittany Boviak(daughter) Mrs. Boviakis the mother ofBrittany. At some point she met and married Mr. Boviak and the two had one daughter:Brittany Boviak. Since she was their only child they spoiled her rotten, causing the snobby attitude she has today. She and her husband also enjoy attending any fancy-do that is available. Like her daughter, Mrs. Boviak is quite snobby and stuck up, even using her daughter's catchphrase "Whatever!" to people. Due to the fact that she and her husband have given their daughter as much as she wanted, it can be assumed that she loves her daughter deeply.
characters.personality_section: Like her daughter, Mrs. Boviak is quite snobby and stuck up, even using her daughter's catchphrase "Whatever!" to people. Due to the fact that she and her husband have given their daughter as much as she wanted, it can be assumed that she loves her daughter deeply.

characters.name: Brittany Boviak
characters.description: Brittany BoviakNamesOtherDuchess/Ms. Boviak (Mrs. Bolt)PersonalSpeciesTsktskianGenderFemaleAge13RelativesMr.andMrs. Boviak(parents)CareerOccupation(s)Captain of the Luna Vista Middle School cheerleading squadVoice actorsVoiced byAnndi McAfee Brittany Boviakis a wealthy, popular six-armedTsktskiangirl who is the captain of the cheerleading squad. She is also revealed later in the series to have a secret crush onLloyd. Although she secretly likes Lloyd, she verbally and emotionally abuses him, giving the impression that he is not worthy of her time. Brittany was born to Mr and Mrs. Boviak in the year X14. Since her birth her wealthy parents spoiled her rotten, resulting in her spoiled and rude personality. When she first attended Woxagon Elementary school in 1st grade she became instantly popular along with her new best friendMegan Uno. Sometime at the start of 1st grade she would meet Lloyd Nebulon, who at first she actually hated after he accidentally ruined her finger painted picture and would continue to hate him until she caught him carving his confession of love to her on a tree in Intrepidville park, where she secretly began to like Lloyd, eventually turning into love over the years. Despite this she was unable to confess her love to Lloyd because when they were little, boys were "Supposed to be icky." and when she was old enough to do so, she had become popular and she thought she couldn't be seen with him as Lloyd was now considered a "dork". Brittany was born into a very wealthy family and as an only child she became spoiled and conceited. As a child, she seemed to be less mean though she was still quite cold. As a teenager, Brittany was snobby, mean, bullying and often superficial. She takes after her mother. During the course of her school years she would enjoy making fun of less popular students, particularly Lloyd, whom she enjoyed tormenting and picked on, though this could be due to picking on Lloyd as her only way of talking to him or as Lloyd's mom pointed out "If a girl picks on a boy, it means she likes him". However she has shown a softer side such as whenever Lloyd reaches any point of popularity, Brittany usually takes advantages of these opportunities in order to permanently keep Lloyd popular so she could be with him. She‘s also known to be very kind to any girl at Luna Vista, regardless of their popularity.

characters.name: Charmaine
characters.description: CharmainePersonalSpeciesCerebellianGenderFemaleVoice actorsVoiced byChristine Cavanaugh Charmaineis a femaleCerebellian. She is seen as a very intelligent character, and often is involved in debates against other schools, often with partnerDouglas. She is friends with Douglas,CindyandMissy.

characters.name: Cindy
characters.description: CindyPersonalSpeciesUnknownGenderFemaleAge13Voice actorsVoiced byTara StrongMayim Bialik Cindyis a girl with two heads: One head is friendly, empathetic, and mature, and the other head tends to be rude, offensive, and grouchy. Cindy is one of the few recurring students to be a friend toLloyd's group.

characters.name: Dunkirque
characters.description: DunkirquePersonalGenderMaleCareerOccupation(s)Second-in-commandVoice actorsVoiced byDan Castellaneta Dunkirqueis second-in-command of the space station. He is a tough and obedient prominent aide toCommander Nebulon.

characters.name: Dunkirque
characters.description: DunkirquePersonalGenderMaleCareerOccupation(s)Second-in-commandVoice actorsVoiced byDan Castellaneta Dunkirqueis second-in-command of the space station. He is a tough and obedient prominent aide toCommander Nebulon.

characters.name: Eileen
characters.description: EileenVoice actorsVoiced byMichelle Horn Eileenis a girl who has three eyes and four tentacles on the lower half of her body instead of arms and legs. Eileen is a female alien with three eyes and a student atLuna Vista Middle School. She appears as a recurring character in the series and she first speaks in the episode "The Big Sleepover" along with the other girls that Lloyd infiltrated the party with a spy camera.

characters.name: Eileen
characters.description: EileenVoice actorsVoiced byMichelle Horn Eileenis a girl who has three eyes and four tentacles on the lower half of her body instead of arms and legs. She appears as a recurring character in the series and she first speaks in the episode "The Big Sleepover" along with the other girls that Lloyd infiltrated the party with a spy camera.

characters.name: Rodney Glaxer
characters.description: Rodney GlaxerPersonalSpeciesUnknownGenderMaleAge13CareerOccupation(s)Quarterback of the Luna Vista Middle School Crush Ball teamVoice actorsVoiced byWarren Sroka Rodney Glaxer[1]is the four-armed school bully who is also the quarterback of theLuna Vistacrushball team. He favors picking on nerds, particularly Mendel, though he has no general qualm or limit when it comes to making trouble for those who are smaller, weaker, or even lack the confidence to confront him. Towards the end of the series, Rodney is revealed to be the reason forLloyd's low standing in the popularity social scale, as he tripped Lloyd in 1st grade when he was a new student, causing him to stumble and fall onBrittany's finger-painted picture getting him laughed at by the rest of class and resulting in Brittany's perceived hatred of him in the future. Rodney was born to Mr. and Mrs. Glaxer in the year X14. Rodney attended Woxagon Elementary in X21, during the beginning of his elementary school years. During 1st grade, his preferred table of choice was with three other future jocks and he was already beginning his future role as a school bully. During this same year on the day when the new kidLloyd Nebulonintroduces himself, Rodney tripped him and made him fall ontoBrittany Boviak's finger painting, an act that humiliated him in front of the entire class exceptEddie,KurtandDouglas. He has since then become one of the biggest bullies, yet also one of the best jocks, at his school and would constantly pick on Douglas, Kurt, and other unpopular kids for the next six years. Rodney is an arrogant, rough-housing teenager who speaks before he acts. A strong Crater Worm jock, he is the quarterback of the Luna Vista Middle School Crush Ball team and, from the start of the series, is portrayed as the biggest bully at Lloyd's school. He often picks on those smaller and/or less popular than himself and sometimes humiliates them in front of the entire school. He primarily focuses on the nerds of his school, with Mendel being his favorite to pick on, though in his first showing as a bully, he targets Kurt and Douglas. In spite of being the meanest bully of his class, Rodney is friends with many other socially-powerful students, such as other jocks and bullies, with at least six being shown to take his lead in bullying and mischief, including Jake, an orange alien who is also a fellow jock on the Crater Worm Crush Ball team, Marcus Xenon, a green, three-eyed, octopus-like alien of the same species as Eileen, and Gina, a female alien of the same species as Rodney, who is possibly either a sibling or cousin of Rodney, though neither of these possibilities are certain. Rodney is also somewhat of a coward when faced with a real threat and will try to act cool while stuttering and shaking (in the case of Kurtlas for example). After being humiliated and defeated twice by Kurt and Douglas and even having to sign a document promising never to bully another student, Rodney did not truly learn from this

In spite of being the meanest bully of his class, Rodney is friends with many other socially-powerful students, such as other jocks and bullies, with at least six being shown to take his lead in bullying and mischief, including Jake, an orange alien who is also a fellow jock on the Crater Worm Crush Ball team, Marcus Xenon, a green, three-eyed, octopus-like alien of the same species as Eileen, and Gina, a female alien of the same species as Rodney, who is possibly either a sibling or cousin of Rodney, though neither of these possibilities are certain. Rodney is also somewhat of a coward when faced with a real threat and will try to act cool while stuttering and shaking (in the case of Kurtlas for example). After being humiliated and defeated twice by Kurt and Douglas and even having to sign a document promising never to bully another student, Rodney did not truly learn from this
characters.personality_section: Rodney is an arrogant, rough-housing teenager who speaks before he acts. A strong Crater Worm jock, he is the quarterback of the Luna Vista Middle School Crush Ball team and, from the start of the series, is portrayed as the biggest bully at Lloyd's school. He often picks on those smaller and/or less popular than himself and sometimes humiliates them in front of the entire school. He primarily focuses on the nerds of his school, with Mendel being his favorite to pick on, though in his first showing as a bully, he targets Kurt and Douglas. In spite of being the meanest bully of his class, Rodney is friends with many other socially-powerful students, such as other jocks and bullies, with at least six being shown to take his lead in bullying and mischief, including Jake, an orange alien who is also a fellow jock on the Crater Worm Crush Ball team, Marcus Xenon, a green, three-eyed, octopus-like alien of the same species as Eileen, and Gina, a female alien of the same species as Rodney, who is possibly either a sibling or cousin of Rodney, though neither of these possibilities are certain. Rodney is also somewhat of a coward when faced with a real threat and will try to act cool while stuttering and shaking (in the case of Kurtlas for example). After being humiliated and defeated twice by Kurt and Douglas and even having to sign a document promising never to bully another student, Rodney did not truly learn from this experience as, in following appearances, he continued to pick o

characters.name: Eddie Horton
characters.description: Eddie HortonNamesOtherDon EduardoPersonalSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAge12RelativesFrank Horton(father)Mrs. Horton(mother)Freddy, Teddy, Betty, Neddy, and Heddy Horton (cousins)CareerOccupation(s)Student at Luna Vista Middle SchoolVoice actorsVoiced byJustin Shenkarow Edward R. "Eddie" HortonisLloyd's human best friend. He is handsome and tries to act in a "cool" manner. Hisfatheris a police officer. Eddie is a tall 12-13-year-old human boy with short, wavy reddish blonde hair, blue eyes and fair skin. He wears a blue long sleeved shirt, black shoes, red pants, and a puffed white vest. Eddie has been known to be sarcastic, witty, and by far the most charismatic of the group. He often causes peer pressure among his friends and is a bad influence on them. Eddie almost never learns from his mistakes and can be unapologetic or remorseless. Despite this, it has been shown that Lloyd develops Eddie's personality as without him, Eddie is brought down to a loner and a dork, more so than before. Eddie also hates to be called Edward. Eddie is also the only one in the group who isn't afraid to stand up to the more popular kids, even when outnumbered or outmatched (though it doesn't end well for him).

characters.name: Frank Horton
characters.description: Frank HortonPersonalSpeciesEarthlingGenderMaleRelativesMrs. Horton(wife)Eddie Horton(son)CareerOccupation(s)Chief of policeVoice actorsVoiced byClancy Brown Officer Frank Hortonis the chief of police in theIntrepidvillepolice force. He is the husband toMrs. Hortonand father toEddie Horton. Frank is a portly middle-aged man with red hair and a mustache. He has slight under-eye bags and forehead creases. Frank is a peaceful, laid-back man who enjoys enforcing the law and protecting the citizens of Intrepidville. He is also a loving father and husband and takes pride in his son Eddie wanting to become a police officer like him. In his police work, Frank is a very clever detective who can track down even the most slippery criminals. He is also very loyal to his friends and family and will never think twice before stepping into a dangerous situation to save someone in need.

characters.name: Mrs. Horton
characters.description: Mrs. HortonPersonalRelativesFrank Horton(husband)Eddie Horton(son) Mrs. Hortonis the wife ofFrank Hortonand the mother ofEddie Horton. She has minor roles in the series, only appearing in "Lloyd's Lost Weekend" and "The Ride Along". She has fair skin, blue eyes, and dirty blonde hair. She wears a long-sleeved violet shirt with pink shoulderpads.

characters.name: Jake
characters.description: JakePersonalGenderMale Jakeis one ofRodney's friends. Jake, like Rodney, is also a bully and one of the Crater Worm jocks on the school's crushball team.

characters.name: Larry
characters.description: LarryPersonalGenderMaleCareerOccupation(s)Prominent aideVoice actorsVoiced byEddie Deezen Larryis the other one ofCommander Nebulon's prominent aides. He is a purple humanoid who frequently acts childishly.

characters.name: Larry

characters.name: Larvel
characters.description: LarvelPersonalGenderMaleVoice actorsVoiced byBilly West  Larvelis a character who only appeared in the episodeNerd from Beyond the Stars.

characters.name: Douglas McNoggin
characters.description: Douglas McNogginPersonalSpeciesCerebellianGenderMaleAge13RelativesWalter McNoggin(father)Vivian McNoggin(mother)Billy Ray McNoggin (cousin)Jeff McNoggin (cousin)Herb McNoggin (uncle)Beta McNoggin (aunt)Granny McNoggin(grandmother)Voice actorsVoiced byPamela Hayden Douglas McNogginis a member of theCerebellianspecies who resembles a brain with glasses, arms, and legs and one of Lloyd's friends. While he is the most intelligent character in the show, he is the least athletic. Douglas was born to Walter McNoggin and his wife. It is unknown whether he and his family lived on their homeworld of Cerebellia or Intrepidville when Douglas was born. Douglas met his three closest friendsEddie,LloydandKurt; the latter of whom would become his best friend for years to come. He was one of the only three kids who did not laugh at Lloyd when he made a fool of himself on his first day. Douglas is an intelligent and intellectual boy, possessing knowledge so vast that it leaves his friends baffled most of the time. However, because of his love for science he has been labelled a "dork" and a "nerd" by many of the kids at Luna Vista. Douglas is in some ways Kurt's polar opposite: while Kurt is big, strong and quite dim; Douglas is small, scrawny and sharp-tongued. Douglas seems to be the voice of reason for the group as he believes that he and his friends should keep their noses out of trouble. Of course it doesn't take much from Eddie to convince him to join in on their schemes.

characters.name: Mendel
characters.description: MendelPersonalGenderMaleVoice actorsVoiced byBlake McIver Ewing Mendelis one of the nerds atLuna Vistaand the main target ofRodney's bullying. He often hangs out with his nerd friends such as Lou and Benny, as well as other unpopular kids.

characters.name: Missy
characters.description: MissyPersonalSpeciesBlobullonGenderFemale Missyis aBlobullonwho resemblesKurtin many ways, she has one eye and purple skin. However, she is slightly smaller than Kurt. She and Kurt seem to like each other as shown in "Double Date," he compliments her saying she is "neat." She is friends withCindy,Charmaineand Kurt.

characters.name: Francine Nebulon
characters.description: Francine NebulonPersonalSpeciesVerdigreanGenderFemaleAge4-5RelativesMr. Nebulon†(father)Nora Nebulon(mother)Lloyd Nebulon(older brother)Leo Andromedos(maternal grandfather)Mrs. Andromedos†(maternal grandmother)Voice actorsVoiced byNicolette Little Francine NebulonisLloyd's little sister. She loves her dollRosie, and loves to use her telekinesis and telepathy. Her favorite TV show is The Daisy Droid Girls (a parody of The Powerpuff Girls). Francine was born toNora Li Nebulonand an unknown Verdigrian male. Ever since she was born, she has been a nuisance to Lloyd and his friends, mostly due to her whiny attitude and telekinetic and telepathic powers. Francine acts sweet and cute around adults (mainly her mother), but she’s manipulative and cunning with Lloyd and his friends. She uses her younger sibling status, telepathy and telekinesis to get what she wants. Despite constantly bugging Lloyd, she admits to him that she loves him and that he‘s the world's best big brother.

characters.name: Lloyd Nebulon
characters.description: Lloyd NebulonNamesNicknamesLloydette (FrancineNebudork (Brittany BoviakandMegan Uno)Nebuloser (MeanCindy)Mama Nebulon (Rodney Glaxer)PersonalSpeciesVerdigreanGenderMaleAge13RelativesMr. Nebulon†(father)Nora Nebulon(mother)Francine Nebulon(younger sister)Leo Andromedos(maternal grandfather)Mrs. Andromedos†(maternal grandmother)CareerOccupation(s)Student at Luna Vista Middle SchoolVoice actorsVoiced byCourtland Mead Lloyd P. Nebulonis a normal 13-year-old boy of theVerdigreanspecies. Though he is a kind and easygoing teenager and despite hismother's leadership overIntrepidville, he and his group are considered the "dorks" of their class atLuna Vista Middle School. Such instances involve or result in the constant bullying and mistreatment at the hands of their classmates, especially ones of the more socially-popular circle. Lloyd has a crush on his classmateBrittany Boviak, the respected yet snobbish head cheerleader who (despite often verbally and emotionally harassing Lloyd) secretly reciprocates his feelings. Lloyd is a tall green alien with a single antenna, 3 suction cup-like fingers, and pointy ears. He wears a red-and-white stripe shirt, blue pants, and yellow sneakers. Despite being an alien, he wears a helmet when he's in space. Lloyd is portrayed as the typical teenager. While kind and caring, he’s almost constantly annoyed and teased by his telekinetic little sister, nagged by his overprotective mother and has trouble fitting in at Luna Vista Middle School, often being teased, shunned and occasionally bullied by the many shallow and/or mean socially-powerful students he goes to school with. Lloyd has also been shown to be very brave in the face of danger and always puts his friends and family before him in these situations. Sometimes, Lloyd takes advice from his friends and they get him into a bigger problem or grounded. He is also known to have a bad temper, but at the end, he always learns his lesson. Around his three best friends,Eddie,KurtandDouglas, Lloyd seems to be more confident and laid back (and sometimes quite cocky). This could mean that Lloyd is only shy around those who aren't really friendly with him.

characters.name: Mr. Nebulon
characters.description: Mr. NebulonPersonalSpeciesVerdigreanGenderMaleRelativesNora Nebulon(wife)Lloyd Nebulon(son)Francine Nebulon(daughter)Leo Andromedos(father-in-law)Mrs. Andromedos†(mother-in-law) Mr. Nebulonis the unseen man who's the husband ofNora Nebulonand the father ofLloydandFrancine Nebulon. There are many mysteries surrounding Lloyd's father as he is never seen in the series. He is actually only referred to once byEddiewhen the gang (with the exception of Lloyd) talks about going camping with their Dads. Eddie then pauses and apologizes to Lloyd for talking about their Dads "with your Dad not being around and all."

characters.name: Nora Nebulon
characters.description: Nora Li NebulonPersonalSpeciesVerdigreanGenderFemaleRelativesLeo Andromedos(father)Mrs. Andromedos†(mother)Mr. Nebulon†(husband)Lloyd Nebulon(son)Francine Nebulon(daughter)CareerOccupation(s)Commander of IntrepidvilleVoice actorsVoiced byApril Winchell CommanderNora Li Nebulonis the commander ofIntrepidvilleandLloydandFrancine's single mother. She is authoritarian, patient, caring and supportive. Lloyd and Francine's father never appeared in the series. Not much is known about Nora's past. Nora had her first child, Lloyd, with an unknown Verdigrian male. When Lloyd was six years old, her family moved to Intrepidville where she became the commander. Eight years later after Lloyd was born, Nora gave birth to a second child, Francine. Nora is a tough commander who is brave, fearless and will always put Intrepidville's safety as well as her family's safety before her own. She is also able to remain calm and level-headed even during the most stressful situations. Nora can be warm and cheerful on occasions, such as on the annual Nebulon family weekend vacations. At the start of the series she also fell for Francine's "cutsy and innocent" acts, but throughout the course of the series Nora began to wise up to Francine's true cunning nature.

At the start of the series she also fell for Francine's "cutsy and innocent" acts, but throughout the course of the series Nora began to wise up to Francine's true cunning nature.
